name: Amherst College
meets_full_need_notes: Amherst meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. Need calculated using CSS Profile and FAFSA.
no_loan_notes: Amherst eliminated loans from all financial aid packages in 2007. Aid consists entirely of grants, scholarships, and work-study.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based aid as RD applicants. Amherst explicitly states financial aid is not affected by ED commitment.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal aid awards if financial circumstances have changed. Appeals reviewed by financial aid office on case-by-case basis. Professional judgment applied.
